title: Chudithar Anindhu Lyrics Poovellam Kettuppar
stanzas:
Chudithar Anindhu Vandha Sorgame Lyrics Poovellam Kettuppar
#Yuvan #Hariharan #SadhanaSargam

Chudithar anindhu
vandha sorgame
en meedhu
kadhal vandhadhu
eppodhu endru konjam
nee sollvaayaa
nee sollvaayaa
nee sollvaayaa

Vizhival paarthu
konjam vandhadhu
viral serthu konjam
vandhadhu
mulu kadhal endru
vandhadhu
theriyaadhe...
adhu theriyaadhe..
adhu theriyaadhe..

unmel naan konda kadhal
enmel nee konda kadhal
edhai nee uyarvaaga
solvaayo

podaa pollaadha paiyaa
nam mel naam konda kadhal
adhi nee rendaaga
paarpaayaa

Chudithar anindhu
vandha sorgame
en meedhu
kadhal vandhadhu
eppodhu endru konjam
nee sollvaayaa

unpaerai sonnaale
naan thirumbi paarkiren
unpaerai mattumthaan
naan virumbi kaetkiren

iruval oruvaraai
inaidhu vittom
irandu peyar
yaenadi ?

unakul naan ennai
karaithu vitten
unnaye kaelu nee

adi unnai naan marandha
velayil un kadhal
maarumaa!!

vidikaalai thamarai
poovidhu vinmeenai
paarkkumaa

unmel naan konda kadhal
enmel nee konda kadhal
edhai nee uyarvaaga
solvaayo

podaa pollaadha paiyaa
nam mel naam konda kadhal
adhi nee rendaaga
paarpaayaa

Chudithar anindhu
vandha sorgame
en meedhu
kadhal vandhadhu
eppodhu endru konjam
nee sollvaayaa

pala kodi pengalile
edarkennai thaedinaai
naan thaedum pennaaga
neethaane thondrinaai

narai koodum naatkalile
enai konja thondrumaa
adi podi kadhaliye
narai kooda thondrumaa

un kannil unnaada
kadhalidhu mudividum
ennamo

en nenjil undaana
kadhal idhu
nenjai vittu pogumo

unmel naan konda kadhal
enmel nee konda kadhal
edhai nee uyarvaaga
solvaayo

podaa pollaadha paiyaa
nam mel naam konda kadhal
adhi nee rendaaga
paarpaayaa

Chudithar anindhu
vandha sorgame
en meedhu
kadhal vandhadhu
eppodhu endru konjam
nee sollvaayaa

Vizhival paarthu
konjam vandhadhu
viral serthu konjam
vandhadhu
mulu kadhal endru
vandhadhu
theriyaadhe...
adhu theriyaadhe..
adhu theriyaadhe..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the beauty and depth of love, highlighting the feelings of joy and longing that come with it.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Poovellam Kettuppar, this song plays during a romantic moment, emphasizing the connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Chudithar Anindhu was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 6, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chudithar Anindhu, the singers Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam deliver a heartfelt performance that encapsulates the essence of romantic love. The song unfolds in a dreamy atmosphere, where the protagonists express their feelings and the beauty of their connection. With its soothing melody and poetic lyrics by Palani Bharathi, it evokes emotions of joy and longing. This enchanting duet is perfect for celebrating love during special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chudithar Anindhu from Poovellam Kettuppar is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, paired with Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a world of heartfelt emotions. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with anyone who has ever been in love.
stanzaMeanings: The paradise that came with the beautiful dress, love has come upon me, can you tell me when it happened?
Seeing your eyes, a little love came, joining hands, a little love came, the whole love has come, but I don't know... I don't know... I don't know..
The love I have for you is on me, the love you have for me is on you, will you say which one is higher?
Hey, you useless guy, the love we have is yours, will you see it as two?
The paradise that came with the beautiful dress, love has come upon me, can you tell me when it happened?
When I hear your name, I look back, I only wish to hear your name.
Why did we separate as two people?
I have left you behind, you ask me back.
Will my love for you change when I forget you?
Will the lotus bloom at dawn, will it see the sky?
The love I have for you is on me, the love you have for me is on you, will you say which one is higher?
Hey, you useless guy, the love we have is yours, will you see it as two?
The paradise that came with the beautiful dress, love has come upon me, can you tell me when it happened?
In many hundreds of girls, you have chosen me, I will search for you as a girl who is sought after.
In the days when the crowd gathers, will I be remembered? Will the dust gather around me?
Your eyes have loved me, it seems to be the end of something.
Will this love in my heart leave my mind?
The love I have for you is on me, the love you have for me is on you, will you say which one is higher?
Hey, you useless guy, the love we have is yours, will you see it as two?
The paradise that came with the beautiful dress, love has come upon me, can you tell me when it happened?
Seeing your eyes, a little love came, joining hands, a little love came, the whole love has come, but I don't know... I don't know... I don't know..
